phases.name: Adapter Architecture
phases.notes: Router, registry, canonical schema constant, base adapter class, dry-run flag

phases.name: Format Adapters — All Formats (CSV/XLSX/XLE/JSON)
phases.notes: All adapters built together: csv_adapter (PEINP + ECCC), xlsx_adapter, xle_adapter, json_adapter (Licor)

phases.name: Pipeline Integration
phases.notes: Wire adapters into cleaning.py: concat → dedup → resample → impute → FWI. Single SSOT output.

phases.name: Stanhope Validation
phases.notes: Compare ECCC reference (Stanhope) to local stations. Analysis phase.

phases.name: QA/QC Reporting
phases.notes: Wire qa_qc.py into pipeline, generate report artifact

phases.name: E2E Validation
phases.notes: Full run, all tests pass, coverage report, zero unprocessed files

decisions.decision: Archive v1 specs and reset state machine
decisions.rationale: Original project complete. Pipeline rebuild needs clean slate.

decisions.decision: Adapter architecture with single entry point
decisions.rationale: All raw files route through format adapters to canonical schema. No files skipped.
Single entry point means csv/xlsx/xle/json adapters built together, not scattered across phases.
Imputation is part of the pipeline flow, not a standalone phase.

decisions.decision: Stanhope is processed like any other station
decisions.rationale: Stanhope uses csv_adapter with ECCC schema. Phase 4 is comparison/analysis only.
Licor integration merged into Phase 2. Imputation merged into Phase 3.
Each phase has failing tests that pass when implementation is complete. Red → green.
